title: Entity Random Search And Dig Behavior
description: Allows this entity to locate a random target block that it can path find to. Once found, the entity will move towards it and dig up an item. [Default target block types: Dirt, Grass, Podzol, DirtWithRoots, MossBlock, Mud, MuddyMangroveRoots].

cooldown_range.title: Cooldown Range
cooldown_range.description:
Goal cooldown range in seconds.

Properties:
• max (float) = 0
• min (float) = 0

Sample values:
• sniffer: {"min":0,"max":0}

digging_duration_range.title: Digging Duration Range
digging_duration_range.description:
Digging duration in seconds.

Properties:
• max (float) = 0
• min (float) = 0

Sample values:
• sniffer: {"min":8,"max":10}

find_valid_position_retries.title: Find Valid Position Retries
find_valid_position_retries.description:
Amount of retries to find a valid target position within search range.

Sample values:
• sniffer: 5

goal_radius.title: Goal Radius
goal_radius.description:
Distance in blocks within the entity to considers it has reached it's target position.

Sample values:
• sniffer: 2

item_table.title: Item Table
item_table.description:
File path relative to the resource pack root for items to spawn list (loot table format).

Sample values:
• sniffer: loot_tables/gameplay/entities/sniffer_seeds.json

on_digging_start.title: Digging Start
on_digging_start.description:
Event to run when the goal ends searching has begins digging.

Properties:
• event (string) = 
• filters ({ domain, operator, subject, ... }) = {"AND":null,"NOT":nu
• target (string) = self

Sample values:
• sniffer: {"event":"on_digging_start","target":"self"}

defaultSnippets.label: Entity ActorDefinitionTrigger
defaultSnippets.description: Triggers an entity event when specified conditions are met. Events activate component groups that change entity behavior—transforming villagers into zombie villagers, switching mobs to aggressive mode, or triggering growth stages. Combine with filters to create conditional state machines that respond to gameplay.

on_fail_during_digging.title: Fail During Digging
on_fail_during_digging.description:
Event to run when the goal failed while in digging state.

Properties:
• event (string) = 
• filters ({ domain, operator, subject, ... }) = {"AND":null,"NOT":nu
• target (string) = self

Sample values:
• sniffer: {"event":"on_fail_during_digging","target":"self"}

on_success.title: Success
on_success.description:
Event to run when searching and digging has ended.

Properties:
• event (string) = 
• filters ({ domain, operator, subject, ... }) = {"AND":null,"NOT":nu
• target (string) = self

Sample values:
• sniffer: {"event":"on_search_and_digging_success","targe...

priority.title: Priority
priority.description:
As priority approaches 0, the priority is increased. The higher the priority, the sooner this behavior will be executed as a goal.

Sample values:
• sniffer: 5

search_range_xz.title: Search Range Xz
search_range_xz.description:
Width and length of the volume around the entity used to find a valid target position

Sample values:
• sniffer: 20

search_range_y.title: Search Range Y
search_range_y.description:
Height of the volume around the entity used to find a valid target position

Sample values:
• sniffer: 3

spawn_item_after_seconds.title: Spawn Item After Seconds
spawn_item_after_seconds.description:
Digging duration before spawning item in seconds.

Sample values:
• sniffer: 6

spawn_item_pos_offset.title: Spawn Item Pos Offset
spawn_item_pos_offset.description:
Distance to offset the item's spawn location in the direction the mob is facing.

Sample values:
• sniffer: 2.25

speed_multiplier.title: Speed Multiplier
speed_multiplier.description:
Searching movement speed multiplier.

Sample values:
• sniffer: 1.25

target_blocks.title: Target Blocks
target_blocks.description:
List of target block types the goal will look to dig on. Overrides the default list.

Properties:
• name (string) = 
• states (int) = {}
• tags (string) = 

Sample values:
• sniffer: ["minecraft:dirt","minecraft:coarse_dirt","mine...

target_dig_position_offset.title: Target Dig Position Offset
target_dig_position_offset.description: Dig target position offset from the feet position of the mob in their facing direction.
